# Technology Stack

## Languages
- TypeScript 5.3

## Frameworks
- React 18.2
- Vite 5.0 (build tool)

## Testing
- Vitest 1.1

## Build & Tooling
- npm (package manager)
- ESNext module system
- JSX transform: react-jsx

## Type System
- Strict mode enabled
- No unused locals/parameters enforced
- Bundler module resolution
